nation: Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point First Nation
auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
economic_notes: Southwind Corporate Development Inc. operates subsidiaries including Points Preference Supermarket Inc., Kettle and Stony Point Gas & Convenience Inc., and 9236058 Canada Inc. Indian Hills of Ipperwash Limited operates a golf course. Stony Point FSA Trust Fund holds $100,392,621 in restricted investments. First Nation is negotiating the 1928 Surrender at Stony Point specific land claim.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to determine asset retirement obligations under PS 3280 for buildings potentially containing asbestos. Auditor firm name not clearly stated - signed as 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' in London, Ontario. Large portfolio investments of $127.4M primarily held in Stony Point FSA Trust Fund ($100.4M) restricted for specific trust purposes. Deferred revenue is very large at $23.5M. Land claims expense includes significant client distributions. Prior year land claims expense was $10,983,700 reflecting large distributions. Two GBEs: Southwind Corporate Development Inc. and Indian Hills of Ipperwash Limited. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Points Eagle Radio Inc., Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point Settlement Trust (2016), and Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point Clench Minors Trust (2021). No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
